## Feature Description

A clear description of the feature.

## Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Detection Rule (if applicable)

```python
"rule_name": {
    "patterns": [r"regex_pattern_here"],
    "severity": "HIGH",
    "weight": 25,
    "category": "Category",
    "desc": "Description",
    "mitre": "T1XXX"
}
```

## MITRE ATT&CK Mapping

- Technique ID: TXXXX
- Tactic: [e.g. Initial Access, Execution, etc.]

## Additional Context

Any other context or references.
